statement: In every magma, Equation 1499 (`x = (y * x) * (z * (x * y))`) implies Equation 3250 (`x = (((y * z) * w) * u) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0404
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y x) (op z (op x y)))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op (op (op y z) w) u) w)
